title: satureja forbesii var. altitudinum
intro: Satureja forbesii var. altitudinum, also known as alpine savory, is a variety of perennial herb in the Lamiaceae family that is native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of alpine savory include its ability to reduce fever, relieve stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. The herb can be prepared in various ways, including being dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a spice in cooking, and can also be used in essential oil form for topical application.
